example.target: O professor exige que os alunos cheguem a horas.
example.gloss: The teacher demands that the students arrive on time.

example.target: A chuva obrigou-nos a ficar em casa todo o dia.
example.gloss: The rain forced us to stay at home all day.

example.target: O barulho dos vizinhos impediu-me de dormir.
example.gloss: The neighbours' noise prevented me from sleeping.

example.target: Evita comer doces antes do jantar.
example.gloss: Avoid eating sweets before dinner.

words.en: to risk, to take a chance

example.target: Decidi arriscar e candidatei-me àquele emprego.
example.gloss: I decided to take a chance and applied for that job.

example.target: Não me atrevo a falar com ela sobre esse assunto.
example.gloss: I don't dare talk to her about that matter.

words.en: to make an effort, to try hard

example.target: Esforça-te mais se quiseres passar no exame.
example.gloss: Try harder if you want to pass the exam.

example.target: Ela dedica-se ao voluntariado desde muito jovem.
example.gloss: She has devoted herself to volunteering since she was very young.

example.target: Comprometi-me a entregar o relatório até sexta-feira.
example.gloss: I committed to handing in the report by Friday.

example.target: Ainda não me habituei ao clima frio do norte.
example.gloss: I still haven't got used to the cold climate of the north.

example.target: As crianças adaptam-se facilmente a situações novas.
example.gloss: Children adapt easily to new situations.

words.en: to make the most of, to take advantage of

example.target: Aproveita o fim de semana para descansares.
example.gloss: Make the most of the weekend to rest.

example.target: Não desperdices água enquanto lavas os dentes.
example.gloss: Don't waste water while you brush your teeth.

example.target: Depois de tanto trabalho, mereces umas boas férias.
example.gloss: After so much work, you deserve a good holiday.

example.target: A decisão não depende de mim, depende do diretor.
example.gloss: The decision doesn't depend on me, it depends on the director.

example.target: Este casaco pertence à minha irmã mais velha.
example.gloss: This coat belongs to my older sister.

example.target: O preço do quarto inclui o pequeno-almoço.
example.gloss: The room price includes breakfast.

example.target: Não podemos excluir ninguém do grupo de trabalho.
example.gloss: We can't exclude anyone from the working group.

example.target: O projeto envolve várias escolas da região.
example.gloss: The project involves several schools in the region.

example.target: Conseguimos resolver o problema sem ajuda de ninguém.
example.gloss: We managed to solve the problem without anyone's help.

example.target: Temos de enfrentar as dificuldades com calma.
example.gloss: We have to face difficulties calmly.

words.note: also used for overtaking a vehicle

example.target: É proibido ultrapassar nesta curva.
example.gloss: Overtaking is forbidden on this bend.

example.target: Ela superou o medo de falar em público.
example.gloss: She overcame her fear of public speaking.

example.target: A temperatura atingiu os quarenta graus no verão passado.
example.gloss: The temperature reached forty degrees last summer.

example.target: Se estudares todos os dias, alcançarás o teu objetivo.
example.gloss: If you study every day, you will reach your goal.

words.en: to carry out, to fulfil (a dream)

example.target: Finalmente realizou o sonho de viver junto ao mar.
example.gloss: He finally fulfilled his dream of living by the sea.

example.target: É importante cumprir as regras da empresa.
example.gloss: It's important to follow the company's rules.

example.target: O plano falhou porque ninguém se tinha preparado.
example.gloss: The plan failed because no one had prepared.

example.target: Não desistas agora, estás quase a terminar.
example.gloss: Don't give up now, you're almost finished.

example.target: Antecipámos a viagem por causa da greve dos comboios.
example.gloss: We brought the trip forward because of the train strike.

example.target: Os meteorologistas preveem chuva forte para amanhã.
example.gloss: The forecasters are predicting heavy rain for tomorrow.

example.target: Estamos a planear as férias de verão com a família.
example.gloss: We are planning the summer holidays with the family.

example.target: A escola vai organizar uma festa no final do ano.
example.gloss: The school is going to organise a party at the end of the year.

example.target: Ela gere uma pequena empresa familiar no Porto.
example.gloss: She runs a small family business in Porto.

example.target: Quem dirige este departamento é a doutora Teresa.
example.gloss: The person who heads this department is Dr. Teresa.

example.target: O professor coordena o projeto de leitura da escola.
example.gloss: The teacher coordinates the school's reading project.

example.target: Gostava muito de colaborar convosco neste projeto.
example.gloss: I would really like to collaborate with you on this project.

example.target: Mais de cem pessoas participaram na corrida solidária.
example.gloss: More than a hundred people took part in the charity run.

example.target: Todos podemos contribuir para um ambiente mais limpo.
example.gloss: We can all contribute to a cleaner environment.

example.target: Confio plenamente na minha melhor amiga.
example.gloss: I fully trust my best friend.

example.target: Desconfio que ele não está a dizer a verdade.
example.gloss: I suspect he isn't telling the truth.

example.target: A polícia suspeita de dois homens que fugiram do local.
example.gloss: The police suspect two men who fled the scene.

words.note: always with em; reparar alone also means 'to repair'

example.target: Reparaste no casaco novo da Ana?
example.gloss: Did you notice Ana's new coat?

example.target: Notei que ultimamente andas mais cansado.
example.gloss: I noticed that you've been more tired lately.

example.target: Verifica se a porta está bem fechada antes de saíres.
example.gloss: Check that the door is properly closed before you leave.

example.target: Ligo-te amanhã para confirmar a hora do jantar.
example.gloss: I'll call you tomorrow to confirm the time of the dinner.

example.target: Os estudos comprovam que dormir bem melhora a memória.
example.gloss: Studies prove that sleeping well improves memory.

example.target: Ela demonstrou uma coragem enorme naquele momento.
example.gloss: She showed enormous courage at that moment.

example.target: Os cientistas descobriram uma nova espécie de planta.
example.gloss: The scientists discovered a new species of plant.

example.target: A polícia ainda está a investigar o caso.
example.gloss: The police are still investigating the case.

example.target: Vamos analisar os resultados antes de tomarmos uma decisão.
example.gloss: Let's analyse the results before we make a decision.

example.target: Convém comparar os preços antes de comprares.
example.gloss: It's a good idea to compare prices before you buy.

example.target: É difícil distinguir os dois irmãos, são muito parecidos.
example.gloss: It's hard to tell the two brothers apart, they look very alike.

example.target: Consegues identificar o erro nesta frase?
example.gloss: Can you identify the mistake in this sentence?

example.target: Primeiro temos de definir os objetivos do projeto.
example.gloss: First we have to define the project's goals.

example.target: Descreve-me a tua cidade ideal.
example.gloss: Describe your ideal city to me.

example.target: Resume o artigo em poucas palavras, por favor.
example.gloss: Summarise the article in a few words, please.

example.target: Podes traduzir-me esta frase para inglês?
example.gloss: Can you translate this sentence into English for me?

example.target: Cada pessoa interpreta o poema à sua maneira.
example.gloss: Each person interprets the poem in their own way.

example.target: O médico esclareceu todas as minhas dúvidas.
example.gloss: The doctor cleared up all my doubts.

example.target: Informaram-nos de que o voo estava atrasado.
example.gloss: They informed us that the flight was delayed.

example.target: É essencial comunicar bem com os colegas de trabalho.
example.gloss: It's essential to communicate well with work colleagues.

example.target: A escola divulgou os resultados no site oficial.
example.gloss: The school published the results on the official website.

example.target: A notícia espalhou-se rapidamente pela aldeia.
example.gloss: The news spread quickly through the village.

example.target: O cão escondeu o brinquedo debaixo do sofá.
example.gloss: The dog hid the toy under the sofa.

example.target: No fim do jantar, revelou-nos o segredo da receita.
example.gloss: At the end of dinner, she revealed the secret of the recipe to us.

example.target: Fingiu que não me tinha visto na rua.
example.gloss: He pretended he hadn't seen me in the street.

example.target: Enganaram-no com uma promessa falsa.
example.gloss: They tricked him with a false promise.

example.target: Roubaram-lhe a carteira no autocarro.
example.gloss: They stole his wallet on the bus.

example.target: O gato fugiu pela janela da cozinha.
example.gloss: The cat ran away through the kitchen window.

example.target: O polícia perseguiu o ladrão por várias ruas.
example.gloss: The policeman chased the thief through several streets.

example.target: A polícia prendeu o suspeito ontem à noite.
example.gloss: The police arrested the suspect last night.

words.en: to release, to let go of

example.target: Não soltes o cão no parque, é proibido.
example.gloss: Don't let the dog loose in the park, it's forbidden.

example.target: Os bombeiros libertaram o animal que estava preso.
example.gloss: The firefighters freed the animal that was trapped.

example.target: O nadador-salvador salvou a criança que se afogava.
example.gloss: The lifeguard saved the child who was drowning.

words.en: to help, to come to the aid of

example.target: Os vizinhos vieram socorrer-nos logo a seguir ao acidente.
example.gloss: The neighbours came to help us right after the accident.

example.target: Caí da bicicleta e magoei-me no joelho.
example.gloss: I fell off my bike and hurt my knee.

example.target: O vidro partido feriu-lhe a mão.
example.gloss: The broken glass injured his hand.

example.target: Esta pomada cura as feridas em poucos dias.
example.gloss: This ointment heals wounds in a few days.

words.note: tratar de = to take care of, to handle

example.target: O médico que me tratou foi muito atencioso.
example.gloss: The doctor who treated me was very attentive.

words.en: to look after, to take care of

example.target: Quem cuida das crianças enquanto estás a trabalhar?
example.gloss: Who looks after the children while you're working?

example.target: É proibido alimentar os animais do jardim zoológico.
example.gloss: It's forbidden to feed the animals at the zoo.

words.en: to raise, to bring up; to create

example.target: Foi criada pelos avós numa aldeia do interior.
example.gloss: She was raised by her grandparents in a village inland.

example.target: Educar uma criança exige muita paciência.
example.gloss: Bringing up a child requires a lot of patience.

example.target: Os pais castigaram-no sem telemóvel durante uma semana.
example.gloss: His parents punished him by taking his phone away for a week.

example.target: A empresa recompensa os funcionários mais dedicados.
example.gloss: The company rewards its most dedicated employees.

example.target: Quero agradecer-vos toda a ajuda que me deram.
example.gloss: I want to thank you for all the help you gave me.

example.target: Desculpa-me por ter chegado atrasado ao jantar.
example.gloss: Forgive me for arriving late to dinner.

example.target: Perdoou ao irmão, apesar de tudo o que aconteceu.
example.gloss: He forgave his brother, despite everything that happened.

example.target: Abraçou-me com força quando cheguei ao aeroporto.
example.gloss: She hugged me tightly when I arrived at the airport.

example.target: Beijou a avó nas duas faces antes de sair.
example.gloss: He kissed his grandmother on both cheeks before leaving.

example.target: Acenou-nos da janela do comboio até desaparecer.
example.gloss: She waved to us from the train window until she disappeared.

example.target: Aposto que vais adorar este filme.
example.gloss: I bet you're going to love this film.

words.en: to be late, to run late

example.target: Atrasei-me porque perdi o autocarro das oito.
example.gloss: I was late because I missed the eight o'clock bus.

example.target: Despacha-te, o filme começa daqui a dez minutos!
example.gloss: Hurry up, the film starts in ten minutes!

example.target: O inverno aproxima-se e os dias são cada vez mais curtos.
example.gloss: Winter is approaching and the days are getting shorter and shorter.

words.en: to move away, to step back

example.target: Afasta-te da borda da falésia, é perigoso.
example.gloss: Move away from the edge of the cliff, it's dangerous.

example.target: Dirija-se ao balcão número três, por favor.
example.gloss: Please go to counter number three.

example.target: Assim que dobrares a esquina, verás logo a farmácia.
example.gloss: As soon as you turn the corner, you'll see the pharmacy straight away.

words.en: to fill up (with fuel), to supply

example.target: Parámos numa bomba de gasolina para abastecer o carro.
example.gloss: We stopped at a petrol station to fill up the car.

example.target: O elevador avariou outra vez esta manhã.
example.gloss: The lift broke down again this morning.

example.target: A polícia desviou o trânsito por causa do acidente.
example.gloss: The police diverted the traffic because of the accident.
